text:
Market today: Oil easing and geopolitical tensions are the main drivers, but tech/chip names are what really move your book. Your concentrated, leveraged position amplifies both gains and pain.
Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL, down 28.7%. Its leveraged nature means it decays, and the current loss is a big red flag. QQQI is a TRIM, down 1.86%, your income anchor needs watching.
Watch: SMH has a BUY signal from the scanner, but your current holding is still in the red. Keep an eye on it.
Bottom line: Manage your leveraged losers and watch for any tech-specific catalysts.
plays: Trim QQQI if it breaks below 52.
Consider trimming SOXL further if it shows no immediate signs of recovery.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
